products.name: Skynode X
products.descriptor: All-in-one integrated autopilot, mission computer, and LTE module for autonomous UAS

evidence.snippet:
### Skynode X
The all-in-one solution to power a fleet of
autonomous robots
===============================================================
![](https://i0.wp.com/auterion.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/auterion-skynode-x-min.png?resize=1080%2C206&ssl=1 "auterion-skynode-x-min")
A fully integrated autopilot and mission computer
to enable any drone with the Auterion software platform.
**Now 30% thinner, 15% lighter and with upgraded performance.**

#### NDAA compliant, open system standards
Built on a secure open source software base, using widely adopted industry standards including MAVLink and PX4 autopilot.

products.name: Skynode S
products.descriptor: Compact chip-down flight controller with AI/computer-vision mission computer for small UAS

evidence.snippet:
### Skynode S
Bring AI and computer vision to small autonomous systems
========================================================
Skynode S is the compact, low-cost, chip-down controller that enables any small UAS system with the Auterion software platform. Featuring a custom designed, powerful mission computer to deploy AI and computer vision applications at scale.
[Learn more about Skynode S](https://auterion.com/company/contact-us/)

#### NDAA compliant, open system standards
Built on a secure open source software base, using widely adopted industry standards like MAVLink and PX4 autopilot.

products.notes: Image title on product page reads 'auterion-skynode-s-blue-uas-cleared', confirming Blue UAS cleared status.

products.name: AuterionOS
products.descriptor: Vendor-independent onboard operating system for autonomous drone and robot fleets

evidence.snippet:
### AuterionOS
Operate a connected robotics fleet
==================================
AuterionOS is the only vendor-independent operating system that runs onboard a fleet of interconnected robots.
Included in every Skynode and select partner manufacturers free of charge
[](#)

products.name: Nemyx
products.descriptor: Swarm autonomy and coordination software for combat drone fleets built on AuterionOS

evidence.snippet:
### Introducing Nemyx
Nemyx: coordinated swarms at scale
==================================
Swarm autonomy. Built on AuterionOS. Scalable, mission-focused.
[Watch Live Demonstration](#live-demonstration)

### Proven Performance
Auterion Achieves Global First in Combat Drone Swarms
-----------------------------------------------------
Single Operator Strikes Three Targets Simultaneously in U.S. Live-Fire Swarm Test
[Read the press release](https://auterion.com/auterion-global-first-drone-swarm-live-fire/)

products.name: Auterion LR
products.descriptor: Long-range one-way attack drone capability with precision strike up to 1,000-mile range

evidence.snippet:
### AUTERION LR
Long Range One Way Attack – Scalable Deep Strike Capability
===========================================================
Auterion’s Long Range One Way Attack capability delivers precision effects at distances of up to 1,000 miles. Proven in Ukraine and ready for allied deployment, it combines combat-tested hardware with Auterion’s open, software-defined autonomy stack to deliver resilient, scalable strike capability.

Auterion’s Long Range capability is designed for industrial-scale production across allied nations. Through partnerships with Ukrainian, U.S., and European manufacturers, Auterion enables rapid co-production, ensuring availability and resilience across supply chains.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201080%20605'%3E%3C/svg%3E "auterion-long-range-05")

Production ramp to hundreds of units per month

Co-production opportunities with allied nations

Proven supply chains from battlefield to factory floor
### Proven Performance

products.name: Auterion Mission Control
products.descriptor: Mission planning and autonomous flight execution app for Auterion-powered vehicles

evidence.snippet:
### Auterion Mission Control
Control any autonomous robot with one app
=========================================
Auterion Mission Control is the app to plan and execute autonomous missions for any Auterion-powered vehicle.
[Contact Our Sales Team](https://auterion.com/company/contact-us/)

products.name: Auterion Suite
products.descriptor: Cloud fleet management and operations platform for AuterionOS-powered drones with subscription pricing

evidence.snippet:
### Auterion Suite
Manage your robotics program from one place
===========================================
Auterion Suite is the cloud operations center for AuterionOS-powered robots. It turns live telemetry, video and precision geo data into a single view of your commercial fleet – health, maintenance, and operations in real time.
[Try Auterion Suite](https://suite.auterion.com/)

Basic
-----
Get started with Auterion connected workflows and streamline your operations with the Suite functionalities
$0
*   Manage up to 2 vehicles
*   Collaborate with up to 5 users
*   Monitor up to 4 batteries
*   Operate up to 5 missions
*   Reporting and Notifications

products.name: Auterion RTK powered by PointOne
products.descriptor: LTE-delivered RTK GNSS correction subscription for centimeter-level drone positioning

evidence.snippet:
Fly Smarter, Land Safer: Auterion RTK Powered by PointOne
The simplest, most accurate way to get centimeter-level positioning. Instantly.
[Get the App Now on our Store](https://suite.auterion.com/store?productId=197)
The Challenge

Pricing
-------
RTK licenses are available from $1,425 per vehicle per year. For organizations scaling across fleets, our team offers tailored bundles with Auterion Suite and multi-vehicle packages to deliver maximum ROI and operational efficiency. Reach out to sales to explore the right plan for your business.
[Get the App Now on our Store](https://suite.auterion.com/store?productId=197)

products.name: Auterion Suite Simulation
products.descriptor: Cloud-based drone simulation environment for pilot training and autonomous mission practice

evidence.snippet:
SIMULATION FOR OPERATORS AND PILOTS
Train your pilots, practice your operations
===========================================
Simulation enables your operators and pilots to practice more often, and with less set up and risk. It even enables them to test new vehicles.
[Learn more](#easy)
